title: ocimum obovatum
intro: Ocimum obovatum, also known as African basil, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family and is native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ocimum obovatum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of diabetes. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
